title: SACRAMENTO

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 846 requires the Commission on Peace Officer Standards and Training to develop a process to identify explicit and implicit bias against race or ethnicity, gender, nationality, religion, disability, or sexual orientation in police officer applicants.",
    "AB 846 mandates police departments to change recruitment practices by deemphasizing paramilitary aspects and emphasizing community interaction and collaborative problem solving.",
    "Screening police officer applicants for biases that could affect their ability to serve diverse communities is a necessary measure for law enforcement reform.",
    "Current police recruitment screening processes do not include evaluations for biases that could render an individual unfit to serve as a peace officer.",
    "AB 846 aims to ensure proper screening for individuals with racial or other discriminatory biases in police recruitment.",
    "Changes in recruitment materials are intended to dissuade individuals with violent tendencies from joining law enforcement."
  ]
}
```
